notes: Created ORD-016 via wizard as Admin. Success notification 'ORD-016 created successfully' shown. Order status: Draft.
Notification included 'ORD-016 created successfully' with order number.
ORD-016 appeared as first row in orders grid after navigating back.
Newly created ORD-016 shows 'Draft' status badge on detail page.
Full wizard flow completed as Admin (USR-001). Activity log shows creation by USR-001.
Full wizard flow as Supervisor (Jan Novak). Created ORD-018. Redirected to order detail page.
Full wizard flow as Operator (Petra Svoboda). Created ORD-021 with Copper Wire Harness, qty 200.
ORD-021 detail shows all fields: Product (Copper Wire Harness), Quantity (200), Priority (Low), Due Date, Assigned To, Production Line (Coating Station), Shift (Morning), Created, Notes.
Operator sees Submit/Edit/Delete on Draft detail. No Approve/Reject on detail or Kanban.
Product field shows 'Copper Wire Harness' (resolved name), not a product ID.
Assigned To field shows '-' (unassigned name placeholder), not a user ID.
Production Line shows 'Coating Station' (resolved name), not a line ID.
Clicked Edit on Draft ORD-021. Quantity spinbutton and Product combobox both became visible/editable.
Supervisor sees Approve and Reject buttons on Submitted order (ORD-027) detail page.
Changed quantity from 200 to 250 on ORD-021 and saved. Value 250 confirmed in detail view.
Edit button not visible on Submitted order (ORD-012).
Edit button not visible on In Production order (ORD-005).
Edit button not visible on Completed order (ORD-001).
Delete clicked on Draft ORD-021. Confirmation dialog appeared: 'Are you sure you want to delete order ORD-021? This action cannot be undone.' with Delete and Cancel buttons.
Created ORD-028 for delete test. Clicked Delete, confirmed via 'Confirm delete' button. Redirected to /orders. ORD-028 not found in grid.

retries.notes: First target order (ORD-021) had been moved to Approved status by parallel test group. Created fresh ORD-028 for retry.

notes: Clicked Delete on ORD-021, then Cancel. Order ORD-021 still present with heading visible.
Checked ORD-012 (non-Draft, was Approved). Delete button not present in action buttons. Only 'Start Production' shown.
